case_title: PABLO KOMIOTIS VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEANNA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KOMIOTIS, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO AUG-25-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT MUST BE SERVED WITH THE NEW DATE WRITTEN ON THE CLAIM FORM. LEFT MESSAGE FOR THE PLAINTIFF. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PABLO KOMIOTIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU/S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
